feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Master Data Governance
feed.subtitle: SAP Master Data Governance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Recap Screen after MDG Change Request
entry.content:
Hi, I am in MDG system and I need to show a simple screen with a checks list that users have done when they click  button SUBMIT of change request. I have my dialog screen with a structure in a FPM_LIST_UIBB_ATS component and I re-implemented the method CL_FPM~RAISE_EVENT method to open my dialog box.

me->core_object->if_fpm~open_dialog_box( 'PAGE_2' ).

Something get wrong when I open my dialog screen because the work flow doesn't start, I can click on the submit button, I can see the dialog box with the checks list but the WF doesn't start. If I comment the row and I don't open the dialog the WF starts correctly.

In addition I should take the list of checked controls and I should add a note to the CR.

entry.title: Advice regarding Central Hub deployment SAP MDG
entry.content:
Hi,

I am soon going to implement SAP MDG central hub deployment. I have few question regarding the approach. Customer wants to implement basic Business Partner model first.

Customer has already implemented SAP MDG-F financial data models which is co deployment of MDG on HANA. Customer now wants to move to Central Hub approach. My questions are as below.

1. First step I am thinking is to implement very basic BP data model solution with no enhancement at all. For out of box configuration, do I just need to activate BP data model or even data model for Customer or Vendor ? Like when I activate business functions do I need to activate just for business partners or even customer or vendors ?

2. In MDG Hub scenario what is the best way to keep baseline config of target system in sync with MDG Hub ? I guess I will need basic config available in MDG Hub to create business partners. 

3. Customer is already using SOA replication and want to use same for Hub approach. Do you see any challenges with this approach ? What is the best recommended method for replication ?

4. I am also planning to use Consolidation for initial data load so that I get advantage of match and best record features. Does it sounds good idea ?

5. Once MDG hub is implemented then what will be the best way to bring co deployed finance data model also on Hub ?

6. In general what are the important things to take care in such project ? Please share any lessons learnt ?

entry.title: Hello experts, need help with finding the cost of the material.
Legacy Data Migration-Materials & MDG
entry.content:
Dear All,

I tried to find an answer for my question in the forum but no luck.  Therefore submitting my request / question related to Data Migration w.r.t. SAP MDG.

We have a plan where we want to migrate legacy material master data into S4H 2022 and later on want to make SAP MDG (Co-deployment) as the only way to create, change etc., of material master data.

Q1. Will it be possible to edit an single material or multiple materials (Mass) update or change from MDG (which are directly uploaded into the S4H initially)?

Q2. In the similar lines what about BP Master too.

Thanks for your inputs.

Regards,

Ramana Rao.

entry.title: MDG Change Request icon
entry.content:
Hi, I am on MDG and I have a GUIBB LIST component view with Change Request column displayed as "link to action" with icon "In Progress" to link my entity to a possible change request of another entity.

When I open my entity in display mode I see the default image but I need to display it only if there is an open change request, when I clink on Edit button I have implemented the BAdI in order to change the field properties and I can hide the image when there aren't any change request to link.

Is there a BAdI where I can change that image in according with a condition based on the value of that column? Eg. If value is 000000 no display otherwise I have to display the icon

Thank you and regards

Antonio

entry.title: Key Mapping in SAP MDGF
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have   MDG hub system with 5 target system, I need to load the data from target system to MDGF hub system and also key mapping to be maintained.

Could you please let me know how can we achieve this.

Is there any documents or comments would be more helpfull.

entry.title: How to to key Mapping for SAP MDGF
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Could you please if there are any step by step document for Key Mapping in SAP MDG.

entry.title: SAP MDG-S integration with 3rd party onboarding system
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

We are planning to add SAP MDG classic mode separate new instance in addition to SAP S4HANA on prem( replacement from ECC and SRM) new instance along with Ariba Catalog & Business Network ( currently linked to SAP SRM)

Now, we have a 3rd party supplier onboarding system ( non-SAP system). What are the different ways of integrating 3rd party applications to SAP MDG for suppliers and material?

Regards

Gaurav

entry.title: How to create CR using SOAP BusinessPartnerSUITEBulkReplicateRequest_In
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Using Service ( BusinessPartnerSUITEBulkReplicateRequest_In ) can we save change request in Draft Mode? if yes what was the parameter need to be passed in the input level ?

And need to capture the the warning ,error or Success messages as well . can any one help me on the development.

SAP Master Data Governance 

SAP BTP, ABAP environment 

 

@markus_greutter 

@SAPABAP 

@MDGS

entry.title: How to Restrict DQM Micro-Service Address Based on BU_GROUP/Account Group
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I need a solution regarding DQM Address Validation which we need to be restrict based on BU GROUP/Account Group.
Is there any Standard configuration need to be done in MDG to restrict it? Or we need to create Custom Enhancement?
Please provide a solution.

entry.title: SAP DQM versus SAP MDG DQM
entry.content:
Hello,

I am looking  for some information and understand about the usage and enablement  of SAP MDG DQM functionality without using SAP MDG and consolidation features in SAP S4 HANA 1909 and later.  I would like to know 

  1. Is it possible to use SAP MDG DQM for products and its associated apps for performing product master evaluation?
  2. IF yes, then do we need to enable the business functions of SAP MDG or is there any configuration guide?
  3. I also read that there is a solution for SAPDQM on SAP S4 HANA but this is only for customers and suppliers? Then how does this solution differs from SAP MDG DQM.

 

Thanks,

Pavan Bhamidipati

entry.title: MDG-F Hierarchy Assignment with Derivation
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

One of our customers asked us to derive the hierarchy, parent type and parent node based on the cost center number.

For example: Cost center number is 10148060. They want us to derive Hierarchy as 101 - Parent type as Cost Center Group and Parent Node as 1014.

However hierarchy attributes are not under the CCTR entity.  They are under CCTRH and CCTRG entities independent of CCTR.

My question is: Do you know any solution for hierarchy derivation?

entry.title: How to read Master Data Consolidation Process ID?
entry.content: How to read Consolidation Process ID inside USMD_RULE_SERVICE BADI i.e. inside Check entity method

entry.title: Hello everyone! How can i migrate my data In S4/HANA on premise, from "T" system to "P"?
MDG-F : No valid target content area found
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm getting the error shown below on the MDG UI screen. This happens when I open a new create change request for Financial Accounting Governance. Click New and select
G/L Account Centrally, the same problem occurs when creating a cost center.

Link Log. Actions with UI Application and Bus. Act.: Standard Definition is configured normally.

 

What could be the cause of this error?

How can I solve this problem?

entry.title: Key differences between MDG on SAP S/4 HANA and SAP S/4 HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Can anyone tell the differences between MDG on SAP S/4 HANA and SAP S/4 HANA Cloud. How feasible it is to move current MDG system on S/4 Hana on-premise to S/4 Hana Cloud. Do S/4 Hana cloud supports all objects in MDG like Financials, Business partners, Material etc...

Any SAP blogs/ Support portal links would help.

entry.title: How to replicate deletion in MDG-F manually?
entry.content:
Hey,

If a cost center is deleted but the replication timing is set to manual, how can this deletion get replicated to the target system so the cost center gets deleted there too?

Releasing the edition didn't help. The Delta Replication parameter is set to "Y" already.

Thanks for your answers! 

Cheers.

entry.title: SAP MDG HANA Search for custom entity
entry.content:
I have created MDG HANA search View for our Custom Entity and in Define Joins, Field Mapping, and Authorizations for Reuse Tables maintained in MDGIMG all the mapping and condition.

when I try to search from Search Application getting below error.

Error in execution of query: invalid table name: Could not find table/view ********::*******_Reuse in schema SAPHANADB: line 1 col 99 (at pos 98)

Appreciate your inputs.

entry.title: SAP MDG: merge or transfer data between two vendors into new vendor and transfer postings
entry.content:
Hi Folks, 

How to perform merge or transfer data between two vendors into new vendor and transfer postings in SAP MDG.

Thanks,
Suggu Sandeep.

entry.title: BW4HANA - SICF - Maintain master data error
entry.content:
Hi experts,

When we try to maintain master data, we receive the next error:

"App could not be opened because the SAP UI5 component of the application could not be loaded.

Failed to load UI5 component for navigation intent "#BWInfoObject-maintainMasterData?ignoreNavigationTargetInSearch=true&iobjName=ZREPOS&sap-app-origin-hint="

I think there is a service missing to activate, could you tell me which one it is?

Thanks in advance

Regards,

Antonio
